sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timezones (id UInt32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_timezones VALUES (1, now()), (2, now() + interval 1 day);
UPDATE test_timezones SET event_time = event_time - interval 3 hour WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, timezone() as current_timezone FROM test_timezones;
SELECT id, event_time, timezone() as session_timezone FROM (SELECT *, timezone() as timezone FROM test_timezones) AS sub_query;
